title: Visual Leaf Decay
description: Shows you when leaves will decay
body:
# Visual Leaf Decay

This resource pack changes leaves to look dead and brown when they are decaying. This can be useful to tell if you have removed all the logs from a tree, or just as a general aesthetic improvement. [Click here for a bushy leaves version.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/visual-leaf-decay/files/3841291) [Click here for a programmer art version.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/visual-leaf-decay/files/3841298)
how the pack works:

Terms of usage
If you use or feature this resourcepack through any medium (PMC, YouTube, Curseforge, etc.), you must credit me and link to this page and/or my profile. If you would like to use this in your public resourcepack, please ask me first, and include credit and a link to this page both in a credits.txt in the resourcepack file and in the description. Usage must be a modification or addition to your pack, not a repost. If you see anyone using my content without permission, please let me know so I can sort it out :)
